subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Hijr
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath rent asunder the veils of all contingent beings through His sovereignty, and hath fashioned the heavens by His command, and hath caused to descend from the darkening clouds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی خرق حجبات الممکنات بسلطانه و خلق السموات بامره و انزل من مکفهرات
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to the people of the world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
